seo.description: Data engineer with 5 years of experience building reliable data pipelines and platforms, focused on data quality and observability.

hero.name: Juan P. Echeverría
hero.pitch: Data engineer with 5 years of experience building reliable data pipelines and platforms.

bio.body: Data engineer with 5 years of experience designing and operating reliable data pipelines and platforms. I focus on data quality, observability, and turning raw data into products the business can trust.

experience.impact: Built the ingestion platform processing millions of events per day (placeholder).
Automated reporting that saved dozens of hours per week (placeholder).

projects.title: Cloud data platform
projects.problem: Slow reports and unreliable data scattered across silos (placeholder).
projects.architecture: Airflow-orchestrated ingestion modeled with dbt on a data warehouse (placeholder).
projects.result: Reliable data and reports delivered hours faster for the business (placeholder).

projects.title: Real-time streaming pipeline
projects.problem: The business needed metrics in minutes, not the next day (placeholder).
projects.architecture: Kafka events processed with Spark Structured Streaming (placeholder).
projects.result: Data latency reduced from hours to minutes (placeholder).

projects.title: Data-quality framework
projects.problem: Silent data breakages reached production unnoticed (placeholder).
projects.architecture: Automated validations wired into the pipelines' CI (placeholder).
projects.result: Quality incidents caught before they impacted the business (placeholder).
